//: Drop this hooks block into your Claude Code settings.json (merge it with whatever else lives there). Copy the reference/ hooks to ~/.claude/hooks/stack/ first, or point the paths wherever you keep them. Every command is a shell invocation; the hook reads its JSON payload from stdin.
// stackUpdateCheck: Config for the update-check SessionStart hook. It reads THIS block from your real settings.json at runtime, falling back to the constants at the top of update-check.js when a key is absent. updateCheck toggles the once-a-day check; templateUpstream is the owner/repo it asks for a version (re-point it if you forked); localVersionFile is the ABSOLUTE path to your installed STACK_VERSION stamp, which lives at your stack's repo ROOT (where the install/upgrade interviews stamp it), NOT in ~/.assistant. The install interview writes your real path here. Absent or wrong = the hook reads v1 and nudges every session. To disable without editing any file, set the env var STACK_UPDATE_CHECK=off.
